# Stress Analysis Generation Instructions

> ⚠️ This document is a placeholder. Agent instructions have not yet been written.

## Purpose

Provide Copilot with instructions for generating a component stress analysis report.

## What this file should cover

- Input data required (BOM, schematic, operating conditions)
- Stress parameters to analyse (voltage, current, power, temperature)
- Expected output format and pass/fail thresholds
